prompt: A narrow, dimly lit corridor stretches forward, its concrete floor cracked and overgrown with patches of green weeds. On either side, rusted metal railings line the path, leading toward a set of escalators at the far end. The walls are faded and peeling, revealing layers of old paint beneath, while the ceiling holds a few fluorescent lights that cast a cold, pale glow. An old, abandoned arcade machine stands on the left, its screen dark and its casing weathered. The scene feels quiet and forgotten, as if time has stood still within this underground passage.The camera moves steadily forward, drawing closer to the escalators. As it advances, the perspective shifts, bringing the metal steps and their handrails into clearer view. The worn texture of the floor and the creeping vegetation become more prominent, emphasizing the sense of abandonment. The distant light at the top of the escalators hints at an exit or another level beyond.
